nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-naped monarch
nodes.summary: White-naped monarch（Carterornis pileatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-naped monarch。

nodes.name: White-naped monarch
nodes.summary: The white-naped monarch (Carterornis pileatus) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the Maluku Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. Taxonomy and systematics This species was formerly placed in the genus Monarcha until moved to Carterornis in 2009. Some authorities have considered the white-naped monarch to be a subspecies of the white-eared monarch. Subspecies There are two subspecies recognized: Carterornis pileatus pileatus - (Salvadori, 1878): Found on Halmahera Carterornis pileatus buruensis - (Meyer, AB, 1884): Originally considered as a separate species in the genus Monarcha. Found on Buru. The Tanimbar monarch (C. castus), found on the Tanimbar Islands, was originally described as a separate species in the genus Monarcha, reclassified as a subspecies of C. pileatus, and again reclassified as a distinct species within Carterornis by the International Ornithological Congress in 2021. References Media related to Carterornis pileatus at Wikimedia Commons Data related to White-naped monarch at Wikispecies

nodes.name: 摩鹿加群岛
nodes.summary: 摩鹿加群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Goliath coucal、Moluccan brush cuckoo等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
